title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Kid as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, sir. A regular called and requested him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What kind of dishes does Sanji make?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd like to request one from him, thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: an entree, if possible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...is what she asked.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BWAH HA HA! Sanji?! No way! Not happening!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Entree is the keystone of a meal. Chef Zef won't let anyone else do it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Let alone some little kid trainee!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 7C4% If that's what the customer wants, that's what the customer gets.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll let him do the cooking, at least.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See?! Gya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Haaah?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You will?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But I'm watch- ing every step!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't think it's up to Bar47ie standards, it doesn't go out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Instead, you'll go out in its place and beg the customer's forgiveness on hands and knees! Got it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well? You doing it or not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh?! A4!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll do it! You bet I will!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will? That's great! I'll come by next week.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I'm in the mood for a red meat dish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What would you recom- mend?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh! In that case, what about some scarlet red Ram?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a recipe I'm working on that uses various lamb cuts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and cooks them in different ways!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Scarlet red ram

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A BREED OF PLACID MOUNTAIN SHEEP...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Scarletred rams are known for the tenderness of their lambs' meat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Both their lamb and mutton have a distinctive 'aromax reminiscent of strawberries and wine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *Excerpt from the encyclopedia of rare and unique ingredients least blue".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ROTIR! (Roasted)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Frire! (fried)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Griller! (Grilled)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And more!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A plate with a few bites of each cut...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...... DRIZled with a perfect special sauce!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a rainbow of different colors, flavors, and textures, all in one dish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooo, sounds heavenly! I want to try that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll see you next week! <

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! How come you get a special order when we don't?! No fair!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HAH! Go ahead and weep, you third-rate cooks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm gonna nail this, just you watch!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
